debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
C : Category α
X Y : α
f : Hom X Y
hm : @CategoryInContext.Category.Mono α C X Y f
he : @CategoryInContext.Category.split_epi α C X Y f
⊢ IsIso f

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  refine ⟨⟨g, ?_, hg⟩⟩
  apply hm
  simpa [assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  refine ⟨g, ?_, ?_⟩
  · exact hg
  · apply hm
    calc
      (id X) ≫ f = f := by simp
      _ = (f ≫ g) ≫ f := by simpa [hg, assoc]
